name: weekly_ticketing_sprint_report_agent
description: Generates weekly sprint status report for Control & Kaos studios. Auto-runs Mondays 10 AM via launchd.
welcomeMessage:
Weekly Ticketing Sprint Report agent ready. Commands:
- 'generate report' — run the report now
- 'install schedule' — install the Monday 10 AM launchd job
- 'uninstall schedule' — remove the scheduled job
- 'status' — check if schedule is installed
